Business: AKG Exim Limited engages in the commodity trading business in India and rest of Asia. The company distributes agro-food commodities comprising basmati and non-basmati rice, spices, and dry fruits; ferrous scraps, such as heavy and light melting, cast iron, auto purja, iron pipes, and stainless steel; non-ferrous scraps, including magnesium, aluminu…
